Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.help

Class HelpFacade

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.help.HelpFacade
public class HelpFacade extends Object
A gate to the KeY documentation system.

Provides the facility to open the documentation at press of F1. The opened page is determined context-sensitive by the current focused component and parent components. Specify the URL via .

  • Method Details

    • openHelp

      public static void openHelp()
      Opens the key documentation website in the default system browser.

    • openHelp

      public static void openHelp(String path)
      Opens the specified subpage of the KeY documentation website in the default system browser.
      Parameters:
      path - a valid suffix to the current URI

    • openHelp

      public static void openHelp(Component path)
      Tries to find the documentation of the given component and opens it.

      The documentation is determined by following the parents to the root and checking for on the classes.

      Parameters:
      path -

    • openHelpOfClass

      public static boolean openHelpOfClass(Class<?> clazz)
      Opens documentation given for the given class.

      The class needs to be annotated with .

      Parameters:
      clazz - non-null class instance.

    • createHelpButton

      public static bibliothek.gui.dock.common.action.CAction createHelpButton(String s)

      Parameters:
      s - path to help page
      Returns:
